description_long: This is a standard traffic cone, predominantly orange with three wide, evenly spaced white reflective stripes encircling its conical body. The cone is made of a flexible, durable material, likely rubber or PVC, and sits atop a broad, square base that provides stability and prevents tipping. The base is slightly raised and appears solid, with a smooth surface and no visible texturing or ribbing. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, matching the orange color of the body, and there are no attachments or holes at the top. The surface of the cone is clean and unblemished, with no visible logos, text, or markings. The overall condition suggests it is new and unused, suitable for use in urban environments to direct or restrict traffic.
description: A bright orange traffic cone with three white reflective stripes and a wide, stable square base. The cone appears new, clean, and free of any markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with three white reflective stripes and a square base, no visible markings.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still displaying the three white stripes and the smooth, clean surface of the cone.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, maintaining visibility of the stripes and the broad, stable base.
description_view_3: Final view, similar to others, highlighting the uniformity and new condition of the cone.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Three wide, white reflective stripes evenly spaced around the cone's body.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or holes.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and slightly raised, made of solid material for stability, with a smooth surface and no visible patterns.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
